_meta.name: Font and Typography Rules
_meta.description: Body font, leading, and spacing rules

F-001.description: Body text uses 12 pt font size by default

F-002.description: Line spacing (leading) is calculated as font_size * 1.2

F-003.description: Continuation lines (wrapped text) return to the left margin without marker indentation

F-004.description: Each paragraph/subparagraph begins on the second line below the prior paragraph (one blank line between)

F-005.description: Two-line minimum space required before forcing a page break

F-006.description: Four lines of space between final body text and signature block

F-007.description: Two lines of space between signature and copy-to block
